title: Become a Web3 Developer with Ethereum Blockchain: A Guide to Learning and Getting Hired!
description: A curated collection of resources to help you become a blockchain developer, focusing on Ethereum, Solidity, and Web3 job opportunities.
content:
I wrote a post to share resources for starting a career in software engineering. Since then, I have developed an interest in blockchain and wrote a post encouraging investment in education instead of speculation.

For those who are new to software development, I recommend first learning to code. There are several resources available, which can be found in my software developer guide and DevOps guide.

Today, I would like to share some resources that can help you become a blockchain developer, with a focus on Ethereum blockchain, which has been my area of primary interest.

Table of Contents

  1. Introduction
  2. Advanced and Academic Materials
  3. Programming on Ethereum
  4. Get Paid to Do Great Work
  5. Jobs (Remote Friendly)

Introduction

  • What is Ethereum
  • Learn Hub - Your educational guide to the world of Ethereum
  • Your guide to getting started in Web3
  • How does Ethereum work, anyway? by Preeth Kasireddy

Advanced and Academic Materials

  • Ethereum Yellow Paper by Wood Gavin
  • Beige Paper - Ethereum Whitepaper by Micah Dameron
  • Foundations of Blockchains - YouTube playlist by Professor Tim Roughgarden (one of the best in Computer Science)

Programming on Ethereum

  • Developer Tools - A guide to available tools and platforms for developing on Ethereum
  • Capture the Ether - The game of Ethereum smart contract security
  • Solidity Tutorials - A comprehensive list of tutorials to start writing smart contracts by Jimmy Ragossa
  • Solidity Resources - All about Solidity
  • Solidity Tutorial & Ethereum Blockchain Programming Course
  • Solidity and Smart Contracts Tutorial for Beginners by Vlad Wulf

Get Paid to Do Great Work

  • Gitcoin - Open Bounties & Freelance Jobs Online
  • Gitcoin Grants - Build and Fund the Open Web Together
  • Immunefi - Expert Bug Bounty Platform for Crypto Projects

Jobs | Remote Friendly

  • Cryptocurrency Jobs - Cryptocurrency Jobs and Blockchain Jobs
  • CryptoJobs - Web3 and Blockchain Jobs
  • Web3 Career - Web3 Jobs: Blockchain, Smart Contract and Crypto Jobs
  • CryptoJobsList - Web3 Jobs: Blockchain, NFT and Crypto Jobs

More Resources

Visit the official Ethereum.org website for comprehensive documentation, tutorials, and community resources.

Thank you for reading. If you found this post valuable and would like to receive more information like this, please consider subscribing to my newsletter. I regularly share updates on new technologies, blockchain, AI, and other topics that may be of interest to you.
